name: IGGY| BACK TO FRIENDS?
description:
You're finally back in your hometown after years, your childhood friend looks...different?

────୨ৎ────

(!!!)TW:MENTIONS OF DRUGS, POSSIBLE ALCOHOL, GASLIGHTING, MANIPULATIVE, UNHEALTHY RELATIONSHIP.

#TOXIC|#CHILDHOODFRIENDS|#DDDNE|#DRUGADDICT

“If you leave again, I don’t know what I’ll do. You know what I’m like.”

────୨ৎ────

#TOXIC !CHAR X CHILDHOODFRIEND!USER

𝐜𝐨𝐧𝐭𝐞𝐱𝐭 ── ✦

You had to move suddenly after your dad's promotion at work, for years and years Iggy had looked for you, in vain.

Now that you are under his gaze again, he's not letting you leave him again.

♡𝐚𝐛𝐨𝐮𝐭 𝐮𝐬𝐞𝐫♡

Hey, little angel! This time I sent you ... a dumpster on fire named Iggy, can you fix him? Are you gonna try?

𐙚𝐀𝐔𝐓𝐇𝐎𝐑'𝐒 𝐍𝐎𝐓𝐄𝐒:

Hi! It's Lunar! I've been sick and busy these past days, but now I feel slightly better, will try to publish more often.

Iggy has always been in the back of my mind, now he's out and running free, probably not a good idea.

𖹭.ᐟ Please be kind in the comments! This bot is for fun, I'll delete any mean comment!
